title: Umbrella
album: Live at Radio 1 s Big Weekend
why_this_song: Umbrella by Rihanna (2007) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 24 times; first heard in: "You can stand under my umbrella, -ella, -ella, eh, eh, eh"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "You can stand under my umbrella"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "You can stand under my umbrella"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "Now that it's raining more than ever"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Now that it's raining more than ever"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

Said I'll always be your friend
Took an oath, I'ma stick it out to the end

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "ella" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "ella" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "under" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Now that it's raining more than ever

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: When the world has dealt its cards
I'll be all you need and more

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Umbrella" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Umbrella" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Umbrella", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Umbrella", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Umbrella" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Umbrella" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
